description:
Add state_remote: Option<String> to Config (config.rs), default None == "origin". Thread it through state-branch setup (store_init.rs: track <state_remote>/balls/tasks instead of hardcoded origin) and the git-remote Participant push/fetch (claim_sync.rs / negotiation) so every balls/tasks round-trip targets state_remote. The code remote is untouched: only the orphan-ref negotiation retargets. Conformance: with state_remote unset or = "origin", every git invocation is byte-identical to today (recorded-fixture test, mirrors SPEC-lifecycle S17.1).

WHY: this is the feature's hard primitive; everything else (remaster, init-safety) is policy on top. Keep the retarget at exactly one seam, the git-remote Participant's remote resolution, so there is no second code path that knows about state_remote.
title: state_remote config field + state-branch sync/discovery plumbing
